name: symvanta
description: Connects the Symvanta code-graph MCP server and steers agents to its tools instead of shell search: the MCP connection, a SessionStart context primer, a skill, slash commands, read-only subagents, and a non-blocking Grep/Glob augmenter (on by default; SYMVANTA_GREP_AUGMENT=off disables it).

mcpUrl.title: Symvanta MCP server URL
mcpUrl.description: The Symvanta code-graph MCP endpoint, as a full URL including the /mcp path and no trailing slash (e.g. https://mcp.example.com/mcp). Keep the default for Symvanta Cloud; override it for a self-hosted, staging, or on-prem server.
